title: podman history: unexpected (incomplete) results
body:
`podman history` on a newly-committed image does not actually show any previous history, and what it does show looks odd -- "imported from tarball"?
```
# podman run --name foo fedora date      (unnecessary output excised for readability)
# podman commit foo bar                              [...]
# podman history bar
ID             CREATED          CREATED BY                                      SIZE      COMMENT
b99450604be5   35 seconds ago   /bin/sh -c #(nop) ADD file:3b79c5864268723...   246.1MB   imported from tarball
```
Compare to docker:
```
IMAGE               CREATED             CREATED BY                                      SIZE                COMMENT
c4c4eabe5c8b        11 seconds ago      date                                            0 B                 
9110ae7f579f        12 days ago         /bin/sh -c #(nop) ADD file:108805f10df80924ae   235.2 MB            
<missing>           4 months ago        /bin/sh -c #(nop)  ENV DISTTAG=f27container F   0 B                 
<missing>           4 months ago        /bin/sh -c #(nop)  MAINTAINER [Adam Miller <m   0 B                 
```
Running `podman history fedora` lists the missing images, although size differs.

comments.body:
Alright, this may be an artifact of how we handle `commit` - under the covers, we tar up the root filesystem of the container and import that tarball as an image.

We probably should be tarring only the RW layer at top, and importing that as a top layer on top of the existing image. This may require c/storage work?
We discussed this on IRC and @TomSweeneyRedHat  has agreed to take a look at it based on @nalind 's input which was to use existing buildah code to do this properly.
I believe this is now fixed.  @edsantiago Please reopen if not.

I don't think it's quite right yet. In particular, the ID of the base image seems to be getting lost:
```
# podman run --name foo fedora true
# podman commit -q foo bar
2cb63c4700ccaf778bc57cfde67120512807ce11fa0ee54abd284967722c794b
# podman history bar
ID             CREATED         CREATED BY                                      SIZE      COMMENT
2cb63c4700cc   4 seconds ago                                                   2.56kB    
<missing>      4 weeks ago     /bin/sh -c #(nop) ADD file:a09c7346f23d88d...   262.7MB   
<missing>      7 months ago    /bin/sh -c #(nop) ENV DISTTAG=f28container...   0B        
<missing>      7 months ago    /bin/sh -c #(nop) MAINTAINER [Adam Miller ...   0B        
```
On the second line, I was expecting to see `cc510acfcd70` (ID of fedora image), not `<missing>`. Comparing to docker:
```
# docker run --name foo fedora true;docker commit foo bar
sha256:f62de1a429c11269c6b88e503642936dbe7ef96b429ee5dd7c1e358e0c61642c
# docker history bar
IMAGE               CREATED              CREATED BY                                      SIZE                COMMENT
f62de1a429c1        About a minute ago   true                                            0 B                 
cc510acfcd70        4 weeks ago          /bin/sh -c #(nop) ADD file:a09c7346f23d88d...   253 MB              
<missing>           7 months ago         /bin/sh -c #(nop)  ENV DISTTAG=f28containe...   0 B                 
<missing>           7 months ago         /bin/sh -c #(nop)  MAINTAINER [Adam Miller...   0 B                 
```
I don't have privs to reopen an issue on this repo.
